description.zh:
你好，今天又有一项重要的任务交给你，我希望你能以专业的态度来对待。

最近，有个疯子在本地区制造了不少麻烦，杀害了大量平民和 PMC，就连叛逃的 USEC 和他们的头目都没能幸免。我们的上级对此非常不满，所以我正在雇人收集一切有价值的情报，来查出到底是谁干的。

我们收到过几封匿名消息，虽然内容经过加密，但我派出的小组已经解码了。现在我们唯一能确认的关键词是“海岸线”和“疗养院”，但你也知道疗养院有多大，我不认为我们应该浪费时间地毯式搜索。

你怎么说？只要你能提供对案件有帮助的线索，我愿意为此付出一大笔钱。
description.en:
Good day, there is another job for you, it's of great importance, so I expect professional behaviour.

Lately some psycho caused a bit of trouble in the region and killed a ton of locals and PMCs, even the rogue USECs and their leaders suffered losses. Anyway, our superiors did not enjoy that show, so I am hiring people that are able to provide useful information to figure out who the culprit of this work was.

We received multiple anonymous messages but they were decrypted so I had a team figuring something out. The only information we got at the moment is "Azure Coast" and "Resort", but considering how big the health resort is I doubt we should waste any time searching the place.

So what will it be, friend? I am willing to pay a fortune for something that will help our case.

5eff09cd30a7dc22fd1ddfed.en: Health Resort office key with a blue tape

name.en: One Way To Solve A Problem
